shorts.title: Residents celebrate, reflect at Scranton Pride vigil
shorts.title_distilled: Residents celebrate, reflect at Scranton Pride vigil.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — People are celebrating Pride Month in northeastern Pennsylvania and reflecting on those who helped pave the way for equality. Pride flags filled Courthouse Square in Scranton on Sunday, as more than two dozen people gathered for the Here Together Show Your Colors Vigil. Organizers, advocates, and community members remembered the [...]

shorts.title: Fire destroys garage, damages vacant home
shorts.title_distilled: Fire destroys garage, damages vacant home.
shorts.description: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — There was some damage to a ranch-style home in Scott Township early Sunday morning. State police say the fire started in an attached garage and spread to the home at Sylvan Acres Lane. The garage is destroyed, and the house is heavily damaged. A fire marshal blames an electrical [...]
